response.justification: Bogdan is a strong fit as a Staff-level engineer with 10+ years experience and exceptional stack alignment. His current role directly addresses AI agent development—a required and rare skill. The primary tech stack is thoroughly demonstrated: TypeScript/Node.js for 5+ years (Optilyz 2021–2025, RIDE 2020–2021, re:cinq), React and MongoDB at Optilyz, and AWS CDK at Optilyz, covering core responsibilities. His emphasis on software craftsmanship, TDD, and proven scalability (millions of requests/second at Dunnhumby) align with architectural and performance expectations. Minor gaps in specific test frameworks and Nest.js are easily bridged given his strong technical foundation.
